LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkLaunch.extraOutcomeDescripti: At the current quality, the gravhulk won't be able to launch again for {0_time} after landing.
Additionally, there's a {0_percentage} chance of having a minor incident when landing the gravhulk.

LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperLaunch.extraOutcomeDescrip: At the current quality, the gravjumper won't be able to launch again for {0_time} after landing.
Additionally, there's a {0_percentage} chance of having a minor incident when landing the gravjumper.
